lang.description: ISO 639-1 language code (th, zh, en, lo, km)

expected_scripts.description: Target language native scripts. Always allowed

allowed_scripts.description: Universally allowed scripts. Default: Common, Inherited

allowed_digit_sets.description: Digit sets: ASCII, Thai, Arabic, etc.

allowed_span_patterns.description: Regex patterns exempt from leak detection. {name, regex, severity?}

protected_glossary_categories.description: Glossary categories treated as warn not fail

fail_if_source_script_ratio_over.description: Source chars / total chars above this → FAIL

fail_if_foreign_span_length_over.description: Single foreign span exceeds this → FAIL

warn_if_foreign_span_count_over.description: More foreign spans than this → WARN
